nasb.text: “If there is a girl who is a virgin engaged to a man, and another man finds her in the city and lies with her,

esv.text: “If there is a betrothed virgin, and a man meets her in the city and lies with her,

cnv.text: “如果有個少女，本來是處女，已經許配了人，有人在城裡遇見了她，和她同寢，

ccb.text: “如果有人在城中遇见已经订婚的女子，与她行淫，
